name: Lampery in Brewet (British)
recipeInstructions:
1. Leave the lamprey to soak for about 4 hours in salted water. Drain and wash well.
2. Parboil in boiling salted water for 15 minutes (eel will take another 10 minutes or so). Drain, allow to cool.
3. Skin and cut into chunks about 12 centimeters (3.5 inches) thick.
4. Melt the butter in a heavy pan with the spices and seasoning and fry the lamprey for about 5 minutes on either side (eel will need a little longer).
5. Add the wine and herbs to the pan and bring to a boil, scraping up all the pan juices. Adjust the seasoning.
6. Serve the lamprey with the pan juices accompanied by hot white bread. This makes a delicious supper dish.
